name: ScrollProgress

unions.name: Msg
unions.comment: A union type representing The Elm Architect's `Msg`

aliases.name: Model
aliases.type: { progress : Int, color : Maybe String, from : Maybe String, to : Maybe String }

aliases.name: ScrollAttributes
aliases.comment: A type representing the arrtibutes we're expecting 'on scroll'.
aliases.type: { scrollTop : Int, targetScrollHeight : Int, clientHeight : Int }

values.name: calculateProgress
values.comment: A function to calculate the percentage an element has been scrolled

values.name: view
values.comment: A view function that will render the scroll progress ekement.
